Name: Hummus
Description: A ground chickpeas mixed with tahini, topped with olive oil and spices and served as a cold dip with homemade pita bread.

Name: Spicy Hummus
Description: A ground chickpeas mixed with tahini, topped with olive oil and spices and served as a cold dip with homemade pita bread.

Name: Stuffed Grape Leaves
Description: Six delicious grapevine leaves stuffed with seasoned rice and steamed, served cold.

Name: Vegetable Lentil Soup
Description: Homemade vegetarian soup made with lentil, carrots, onions, celery and spices.

Name: Combo Feast
Description: Combination of shish kabob, kefta kabob, shawarma, chicken tender and falafel served with rice, salad and homemade pita bread. *Pita bread contains gluten

Name: Beef Shish Kabob Entree
Description: Grilled pieces of tender marinated beef (7 pcs.) served with rice, salad and homemade pita bread. *Pita bread contains gluten

Name: Kefta Kabob Entrée
Description: Grilled, seasoned and ground cuts of tender beef (7 pcs.), minced onion and parsley, served with rice, salad and homemade pita bread

Name: Beef Shawarma Entrée
Description: Thin slices of lightly seasoned beef cooked on a slowly revolving rotisserie, served with rice, salad and homemade pita bread

Name: Beef Shish Kabob Sandwich
Description: Grilled pieces of marinated tender beef, served in a homemade pita pocket with lettuce and tomato.

Name: Kefta Kabob Sandwich
Description: Grilled, seasoned and ground cuts of tender beef, minced onion and parsley, served in a homemade pita pocket with lettuce and tomato.

Name: Beef Shawarma Sandwich
Description: Thin slices of lightly seasoned beef cooked on a slowly revolving rotisserie and served in a homemade pita pocket with lettuce, tomato and tahini sauce.

Name: Chicken Shawarma Sandwich
Description: Thin slices of marinated chicken cooked on a slowly revolving rotisserie served in a homemade pita pocket with lettuce and tomato.

Name: Gourmet Falafel Sandwich
Description: Seasoned ground chickpeas and vegetables, formed into patties and deep fried to a flavorful crispness, served with potatoes and finely diced tomatoes, cucumbers, and pickles inside of a pita pocket.

Name: Lamb Kabob Sandwich
Description: Fresh lamb, ground, spiced and grilled, served in a homemade pita pocket with lettuce and tomato.

Name: French Fries
Description: Our top quality fries, crisped to a golden perfection.

Name: Falafel
Description: Seasoned ground chickpeas and vegetables, formed into patties and deep fried to a flavorful crispness.

Name: Kinafa
Description: A traditional Middle Eastern dessert made of a layer of shredded fillo dough on top of a layer of melted cheese. Topped with pistachios and a simple syrup.

Name: Baklawa
Description: A dessert made of layers of fillo dough, with a walnut and cinnamon filling, sweetened with a simple syrup.
